scenes.description: Man or woman in their late 60s, dressed casually (flannel shirt, light jacket), standing tall and relaxed on a large wooden deck freshly cleared of leaves. They hold a compact white/grey blower effortlessly in one hand, arm slightly lowered at their side. Their expression is calm and satisfied — not triumphant, just quietly proud. Warm golden late-afternoon autumn light rakes across the deck boards. Background: a lush garden with orange and amber foliage. No strain, no effort visible in the posture.
scenes.mood: Warm, authentic, quietly proud. Autumn palette — ochre, amber, deep green. Soft golden hour light. Feels like a real person, not a stock photo.

scenes.description: Same avatar profile (65+), standing on a porch or backyard path, looking out at their yard with a pensive, slightly weary expression. They are not using any tool — just pausing, perhaps one hand resting on the porch railing. The yard has leaves scattered on the ground. The mood is reflective, not dramatic. Slightly muted warm tones — desaturated compared to the hero image — suggesting the emotional weight of feeling limited.
scenes.mood: Reflective, gently melancholic. Warm but desaturated — as if a filter has dimmed the scene. Honest and relatable, not pitiful.

scenes.description: Close-up on the upper body of an older adult (60+) visibly straining to hold a large, bulky gas-powered leaf blower with both hands. Shoulders raised, back slightly hunched, expression showing effort and mild discomfort. The blower looks oversized and heavy relative to their frame. Cool, slightly desaturated tones — overcast light, concrete driveway setting. Visual contrast to the warmth of the solution sections.
scenes.mood: Effort, physical strain, frustration. Cool desaturated palette — grey concrete, muted greens. Honest but not alarmist. Creates contrast with the solution visuals.

scenes.description: Person aged 60-70, standing perfectly upright on a clean driveway or deck covered in wet autumn leaves. They hold the Seese Pro blower casually in one hand, arm relaxed. In their other hand: a coffee mug. Their posture is effortless — they look like they could stand there all day. Leaves are visibly flying off the surface in front of them. Warm golden morning light. Expression: calm, slightly amused, completely at ease. The scene should feel almost nonchalant — that's the point.
scenes.mood: Effortless, warm, almost nonchalant. Strong visual contrast with the problem image. Autumn morning light — honey tones, soft shadows. The coffee cup is a key storytelling prop.

scenes.description: Split-scene composition. Left half: relaxed adult (60+) pointing the Seese Pro at the hood of a car, water droplets flying off in a visible arc — satisfying action shot. Right half: different adult (60+, could be opposite gender for variety) blowing autumn leaves off a wooden porch with the same blower, leaves mid-air. Both figures have the same relaxed, upright posture. Warm consistent light across both halves. Could include a subtle 'real user' aesthetic — slightly candid framing.
scenes.mood: Proof-driven but warm. Dual-scene format shows versatility without feeling like a tech spec sheet. Autumn warmth maintained. Real-feeling, not overly styled.

scenes.description: Flat lay on a warm natural wood surface (oak or pine boards, slightly worn). Center: the Seese Pro blower. Arranged around it: the battery pack, wall charger, carry case (open to show interior), ear plugs, and any included accessories. Everything laid out with generous spacing — not cluttered. Soft warm natural light from above-left. Slight shadows add depth. The carry case is partially open and placed to show how compact the full kit is. Neutral beige/cream background elements if needed. No text overlays.
scenes.mood: Clean, warm, reassuring. The wood surface anchors the autumn/nature palette. Feels like a thoughtful gift unboxed, not a tech product catalog. Inviting and tangible.

scenes.description: Full or three-quarter body shot of a person 65+, standing tall and still on a spotless wooden deck. The Seese Pro hangs easily in one hand at their side — no effort, just possession. Their other hand is free and relaxed. Expression: calm, self-assured, quietly proud. They are looking slightly off-camera or into the middle distance — not posing for the camera, just existing in their clean, well-kept space. Warm late-afternoon golden light. Lush autumn garden behind them — ochre, amber, green. The image should feel like the earned ending of a good day.
scenes.mood: Quiet pride, independence, warmth. This is the emotional resolution of the entire advertorial. Golden hour, rich autumn palette. The person looks capable, not heroic — competent, not athletic. Peaceful confidence.
